auth.subtitle: Advanced Medical Simulation Protocol
auth.resendButton: Didn't receive the email? Click to resend
auth.resendSuccess: Activation email resent successfully. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerSuccessMsg: Registration successful! You can now login to access the platform.
auth.registerVerifyMsg: Registration successful! Please check your email to activate the account before logging in.
auth.passwordRequirements: Password must have at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character.

alerts.csvLoaded: BioGears file successfully loaded (ID: {{id}}). You may now press START!
alerts.scenarioReady: Scenario loaded and ready. Click START.
alerts.liveStarted: Livestream Session Started. Waiting for IoT equipment.
alerts.liveFailed: No active simulation and failed to create Livestream session.
alerts.searchFailed: Failed to search for active simulations!
alerts.liveEnded: LIVE session terminated remotely on the server.
alerts.sessionRecorded: The session was recorded in the history.

dashboard.alertStartSim: Please start (and finish) a simulation first to generate a report.
dashboard.rationaleText: Clinical report automatically generated after patient monitoring.
dashboard.downloadFatalError: An error occurred while generating the PDF report. Check server connection.

iot.waitingDescription: The simulation (Live Session) has started on the server. The Dashboard is now listening for transmissions from the medical equipment.
iot.autoStartHint: The transmission will begin automatically as soon as the IoT script makes its first POST.

history.title: Simulations History

history.noResults: No simulations found with current filters.

history.downloadError: An error occurred downloading the PDF report. It might not be generated yet.
history.noReports: No reports generated for this simulation yet.

rules.title: Rules List
rules.subtitle: Alert management for the clinical simulation engine.
rules.noResults: No rules found with selected filters.
rules.errorSave: Error saving. Only ADMIN users can create rules, or values may be invalid!
rules.errorToggle: Error toggling rule state. Only ADMIN users can disable/enable rules!
rules.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

modal.subtitle: Enter the mathematical thresholds for the alerts.
modal.hysteresisInfo: Advanced hysteresis (resolution) is not automatically calculated for the "Equal to" condition. The alert will assume a linear transition as soon as the condition is no longer met.
modal.bpAlert: The threshold value for Blood Pressure must be between 0 and 300 mmHg.
modal.subtitleHysteresis: Set degradation and convalescence thresholds to simulate the patient realistically.

definitions.title: Global Settings
definitions.subtitle: Configure fundamental parameters of the VITALSIM CORE ecosystem, including security protocols and experimental feature flags.
definitions.timeoutDesc: Elapsed time without user interaction before automatic closure of the active clinical session.
definitions.humanBodyDesc: Displays the interactive anatomical model in the main dashboard control panel.
definitions.chaosDb: Chaos Engineering: Force DB Failure (Degraded Mode)
definitions.chaosDbDesc: Tests system resilience by simulating a Database failure. The system will operate entirely in memory with limited capabilities (Degraded Mode).

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Permission administration and access control to the clinical console.
